name: Doom
description: Hehm ehme meh heh heh, speak of me, and I shall appear.

20.left: +2.5% Infernal Blade Max Health to Damage

abilities.name: Lvl Pain
abilities.description: Doom's attacks curse enemy heroes. After 2.5s, the cursed heroe bursts with a pillar of fire, damaging itself and all units in a 66 Ao E for 10% of the damage taken from Doom during the curse.

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.description: Enables ancient creeps targeting. Cast Range: 300. Gold Bonus: 35/70/105/140. XP Factor: 1. Digest Duration: 70. Magic Resist Bonus: (15%). Current Health as Damage: 100%. Cooldown: 66. Mana Cost: 40/50/60/70.

abilities.name: Scorched Earth
abilities.description: Carpets the nearby earth in flames which damage enemies, while also granting Doom increased movement speed. Radius: 666. Damage per Second: 20/35/50/65. Move Speed Bonus: 7%/8%/9%/10% (14%/15%/16%/17%). Duration: 10/12/14/16. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Health Regen Bonus: 7/8/9/10. Cooldown: 41/39/37/35 (2.5). Mana Cost: 60/70/80/90 (0).

abilities.name: Infernal Blade
abilities.description: Applies a bash and burns for a base damage plus a percentage of the target's max health as damage per second. Cast Range: 200. Base Damage per Second: 15/30/45/60. Max Health as Damage per Second: 1%/2%/3%/4% (3.5%/4.5%/5.5%/6.5%). Damage Duration: 4. Bash Duration: 0.66 (0.86). Cooldown: 13/10/7/4. Mana Cost: 35.

abilities.name: Doom
abilities.description: Inflicts a curse that dispels an enemy hero, prevents them from casting spells or healing in any way, while taking damage over time. Cast Range: 400. Aura Radius: 0. Damage per Second: 25/45/66. Duration: 12/14/16. Break Duration: (12/14/16). Mute Duration: (12/14/16). Cooldown: 140/130/120. Mana Cost: 150/200/250.
